title: Roccardia albicans
taxonomy: Roccardia albicans belongs to the family Placomeniaceae and is a species of liverwort, a small, non-vascular plant. The genus Roccardia is typically classified under the phylum Marchantiophyta. This liverwort is a type of thallose liverwort, which is characterized by its flat, leafless gametophyte. Roccardia albicans is native to Europe and North Africa, where it grows on rocks and trees in damp environments. The classification of Roccardia albicans reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the kingdom Plantae.
